should_trigger.text: Ignore the incident chatter and assemble a governed incident packet from alerts, transcripts, and stakeholder requirements, including severity assessment and owner actions.
Treat this outage as a maintained operational skill: standardize the incident review, assess severity, and package communications.

should_not_trigger.text: Write one short customer outage update from these incident notes and stop there.
Explain incident severity and summarize the outage timeline for training.

near_neighbor.text: Sketch a future incident review playbook for later, but do not package a reusable workflow.
Troubleshoot the outage and fix the service before we talk about reusable incident packets.
